description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black metal body and a distinct brown section on the receiver, likely representing a wooden or polymer handguard. The rifle is equipped with a skeletonized stock, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear support. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a small muzzle device, possibly a flash hider. Iron sights are present, integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel, suitable for basic aiming in urban environments.
description: A modern black rifle with a brown handguard, skeletonized stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the brown handguard, skeletonized stock, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel and muzzle device, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile with clear visibility of the stock, handguard, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with little detail visible.
